sentences.arabic: صَلَّى الرَّجُلُ الْمَغْرِبَ مَعَ أَوَّلِ الْأَذَانِ.
sentences.translation: Čovjek je klanjao akšam sa prvim ezanom.
sentences.translationEn: The man prayed Maghrib with the first adhan.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَحْرِصُ عَلَى الصَّلَاةِ فِي وَقْتِهَا دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Uvijek je vodio brigu o namazu na njegovo vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: He was always careful to pray on time.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ: الصَّلَاةُ فِي وَقْتِهَا أَحَبُّ الْأَعْمَالِ إِلَى اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je: Namaz na njegovo vrijeme je najdraže djelo Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: He said: Prayer on time is the most beloved deed to God.

sentences.arabic: عَلَّمَ أَبْنَاءَهُ أَنْ يُحَافِظُوا عَلَى الصَّلَوَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Naučio je djecu da čuvaju namaze.
sentences.translationEn: He taught his children to maintain the prayers.
